required_skills: Purchase Order Management and Procurement Operations
Vendor Management and Supplier Relationship Management
responsibilities: Manage end-to-end procurement activities including supplier selection, purchase order processing, and contract administration to ensure uninterrupted material availability.
Conduct supplier evaluations using performance metrics, pricing benchmarks, and compliance requirements to support strategic sourcing decisions.
Negotiate pricing agreements and commercial terms with vendors to achieve cost savings while maintaining quality and service standards.
Develop procurement reports and spend analytics dashboards to identify sourcing opportunities and monitor supplier performance trends.
Collaborate with supply chain, finance, and operations teams to align purchasing strategies with organizational objectives and demand forecasts.
Implement procurement process improvements that streamline purchasing workflows, reduce cycle times, and enhance operational efficiency.
Monitor contract compliance and vendor obligations to mitigate procurement risks and maintain regulatory adherence across purchasing activities.
Support category management initiatives through market research, supplier benchmarking, and total cost of ownership analysis.
